prompt: Convert the image to a clear black and white line drawing, preserving the main structure and details, simplifying the background as much as possible.
label: 转线稿

prompt: Colorize the line art: add clean, harmonious colors while preserving the original linework, structure, and details; keep the composition unchanged; apply subtle shading if appropriate; keep the background simple.
label: 线稿上色

prompt: Convert the image to Studio Ghibli animation style: soft colors, delicate light and shadow, warm atmosphere, preserving the main composition.
label: 吉卜力

prompt: Convert the image to Makoto Shinkai style: transparent light, highly saturated sky, delicate light and shadow and colors, preserving the main composition.
label: 新海诚

prompt: Blur the background to create a natural shallow depth of field (bokeh). Keep the subject sharp and unchanged; preserve edges cleanly; keep the result realistic.
label: 背景虚化

prompt: Replace the background with a clean solid white background. Keep the subject unchanged; preserve fine details and clean edges; avoid halos; make it look like a studio product photo.
label: 纯色背景

prompt: Remove unwanted objects/clutter from the image and fill the removed areas naturally. Keep the main subject and composition unchanged; make the edit seamless with consistent texture and lighting.
label: 移除杂物

prompt: Natural portrait retouch: remove blemishes and small imperfections, even skin tone while preserving skin texture, keep the person's identity unchanged; avoid over-smoothing; keep colors natural.
label: 人像美化

prompt: Improve lighting and exposure: brighten shadows, balance highlights, enhance clarity while keeping the subject and composition unchanged; make it look natural, not over-processed.
label: 补光提亮

prompt: Enhance color and contrast: correct white balance, increase vibrance slightly, improve overall clarity while keeping the subject unchanged; avoid over-saturation and preserve a natural look.
label: 色彩增强

prompt: Convert the image to a watercolor painting style: soft washes, subtle paper texture, gentle edges; preserve the main composition and subject; keep it artistic and clean.
label: 水彩风

prompt: Convert the image to a cyberpunk style: neon lighting, futuristic atmosphere, high-contrast dramatic light and shadow; preserve the main composition and subject structure.
label: 赛博朋克

prompt: Convert the image to an oil painting style: rich brush strokes, subtle canvas texture, painterly lighting; preserve the subject and composition; keep details coherent and clean.
label: 油画风

prompt: Convert the image to a graphite pencil sketch: clean pencil lines with natural shading and hatching; preserve the subject and composition; keep the background minimal.
label: 铅笔素描

prompt: Convert the subject into a high-quality 3D collectible figurine/toy style: clean materials, subtle reflections, studio lighting; preserve pose and composition; keep background simple.
label: 3D手办

prompt: Apply a cinematic film color grade: balanced contrast, soft highlights, natural skin tones, subtle film grain; keep the subject unchanged; avoid over-saturation.
label: 胶片电影感

prompt: Night photo enhancement: reduce noise, recover shadow details, balance highlights, improve clarity while keeping a natural look; avoid over-sharpening and preserve the subject identity.
label: 夜景增强

prompt: High-quality redraw of the image: keep the subject and composition unchanged, enhance details and texture, make the overall image clearer and more natural.
label: 重绘

prompt: Remove text content from the image, complete the occluded areas, making the picture natural and seamless.
label: 移除文字

prompt: Remove watermarks/logos from the image, complete the occluded areas, making the picture natural and seamless.
label: 移除水印

prompt: <lora:clothes_remover_v0:1>,remove clothes
label: 一键移除
